entity.id.description: The unique identifier for the entity

entity.website.description: Website name, no translation needed, keep as 'Ace Data Cloud'

entity.platform.description: Text indicating this is an API service platform

status.loading.description: Status text displayed while content is loading

entity.createdAt.description: The time when the entity was created

message.noTasks.message: No historical tasks, please start a new task~
message.noTasks.description: Message when there are no tasks

message.usedAmount.description: Used to display the amount of service that has been used

message.mobileAppDescription.message: Use AceData directly on your phone. Currently, Android APK is available for download, and the iOS installation package will be available after signing.
message.mobileAppDescription.description: Description text for the mobile app download page

message.mobileAndroidHint.message: For Android phones and tablets, scan the code to download the latest APK.

message.mobileAndroidPending.message: The Android installation package is not ready yet, please try again later.
message.mobileAndroidPending.description: Hint when the Android installation package is not available

message.mobileAvailableNow.description: Used to indicate that Android is available for download

message.mobileSecureDelivery.description: Used to emphasize that the download link is delivered via CDN

message.mobileDirectInstall.description: Used to describe the direct APK installation method for Android

message.mobileLatestRelease.description: Used to indicate that the current display is the latest public version

message.mobileSharedAccount.message: Shared account and quota with the web version
message.mobileSharedAccount.description: Used to indicate that the mobile version shares the account with the web version

message.mobileIosHint.message: For iPhone and iPad, install directly online; if the system intercepts, you can also download the IPA first and then distribute it.

message.mobileIosPending.message: The iOS installation package is not yet available for download, it will be provided after completing the Apple certificate and provisioning profile.
message.mobileIosPending.description: Hint when the iOS installation package is not available

message.mobileInstallNote.message: When installing the enterprise or Ad Hoc package for the first time on iOS, the system may require you to trust the certificate in 'Settings > General > VPN & Device Management'.

title.mobileApp.description: Title for the mobile app download page

title.mobileFastAccess.message: Faster Access, No App Store Detours
title.mobileFastAccess.description: Title for the download page advantage card, emphasizing quick installation

title.mobileTrustedRelease.message: Centralized Version Management, More Stable Distribution
title.mobileTrustedRelease.description: Title for the download page advantage card, emphasizing version and distribution stability

title.mobileUnifiedExperience.message: Consistent Experience Across Mobile and Web
title.mobileUnifiedExperience.description: Title for the download page advantage card, emphasizing unified experience

nav.mobileApp.description: Mobile app download entry in the navigation

message.mobileFastAccess.message: Users can scan the code on their phone for direct installation, or download the APK on the desktop and distribute it to team members, suitable for quick trials and internal testing.
message.mobileFastAccess.description: Download page advantage description, emphasizing quick access

message.mobileTrustedRelease.message: Download entries are centralized on one page, with version numbers, platform status, and installation methods visible at a glance, reducing communication costs caused by scattered links.
message.mobileTrustedRelease.description: Download page advantage description, emphasizing unified distribution

message.mobileUnifiedExperience.message: The account system, quota, and service entry after logging in remain consistent with the web version, allowing users to switch seamlessly between desktop and mobile.
message.mobileUnifiedExperience.description: Download page advantage description, emphasizing unified account experience

message.remainingAmount.description: Used to display the remaining amount of service
